data.body: S1 LIVE CUTOVER complete + verified. Pushed refs/meta/config d9bb365->2415e53 (admin, signed-off). Autosubmit label live: GET /labels/Autosubmit = NoBlock, values -1/0/+1, default 0, non-gating. Access diff vs baseline: ONLY 2 new grants (label-Autosubmit on refs/heads/* for Contributors+Administrators, -1..+1 ALLOW); NO removals/changes — two-vote gate untouched. S1 operator ACs satisfied. S1 change #582 pushed for review (awaiting votes). Now: reviewing/claiming S2 tree (0ee8 + 89f9/a9e3/1ccf).
